title: Friendly Creeper Mod
description: Creepers and fireball explosions are prohibited
body:
# Friendly Creeper Mod

## This mod disables Creeper explosions

It is an open source project

[Github](https://github.com/UNK-114514/friendly-creeper)

[Bugs](https://github.com/UNK-114514/friendly-creeper/issues)

## Why not use gamerule?

1. It will prevent the wool farm from operating normally.

2. It will prevent villagers from picking up food.

...
